headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Diamondback Energy, Raises Price Target to $255
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Stephen Richardson   maintains Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $245 to $255.

headline: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Launch of Tender Offers for Any and All of its Outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052
summary: MIDLAND, Texas, April 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) (the “Company” or “Diamondback”) today announced the commencement of tender offers to purchase for cash any and all of the Senior Notes issued by the Company listed in the table below (collectively, the “Notes”).
